actions.label: Read HQ Dispatch health
actions.authority_boundary: Returns fixed local service posture only; it cannot execute, submit, approve, mutate, authenticate, or inspect external state.

actions.label: Read authoritative registry projection
actions.authority_boundary: Reads only hardcoded in-repository registry and policy files; it performs no plugin observation, capability resolution, command execution, or authority decision.

actions.label: Preview canonical route
actions.authority_boundary: Invokes only the fixed route-preview wrapper and canonical read-only classifiers; writes only a non-mission preview artifact beneath .codex-local/hq-dispatch/preview.
